generated_exposure.exposure_text: I'm a mom who just wants our country to be safe. Supporting strategic autonomy isn't about being isolationist - it's about making sure we can protect our families when it matters most. Look at how our allies are stepping up their own defenses - we need to do the same without relying on others. #NationalSecurity #StrongFamilies
